'''fodachaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:zonal|zonal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-d-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zonal|zonal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fodachaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fodachithi|fodachithi]] || [[word:fodachiji|fodachiji]] || [[word:fodachishi|fodachishi]] || [[word:fodachiki|fodachiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fodachuthuthu|fodachuthuthu]] || [[word:fodachujuju|fodachujuju]] || [[word:fodachushushu|fodachushushu]] || [[word:fodachukuku|fodachukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fodachuthu|fodachuthu]] || [[word:fodachuju|fodachuju]] || [[word:fodachushu|fodachushu]] || [[word:fodachuku|fodachuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fodachufthuf|fodachufthuf]] || [[word:fodachufjuf|fodachufjuf]] || [[word:fodachufshuf|fodachufshuf]] || [[word:fodachufkuf|fodachufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fodachethe|fodachethe]] || [[word:fodacheje|fodacheje]] || [[word:fodacheshe|fodacheshe]] || [[word:fodacheke|fodacheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fodachothotho|fodachothotho]] || [[word:fodachojojo|fodachojojo]] || [[word:fodachoshosho|fodachoshosho]] || [[word:fodachokoko|fodachokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fodachotho|fodachotho]] || [[word:fodachojo|fodachojo]] || [[word:fodachosho|fodachosho]] || [[word:fodachoko|fodachoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fodachofthof|fodachofthof]] || [[word:fodachofjof|fodachofjof]] || [[word:fodachofshof|fodachofshof]] || [[word:fodachofkof|fodachofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fodachĂŻfthĂŻf|fodachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:fodachĂŻfjĂŻf|fodachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:fodachĂŻfshĂŻf|fodachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:fodachĂŻfkĂŻf|fodachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fodachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|fodachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:fodachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|fodachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:fodachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|fodachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:fodachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|fodachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fodachĂŻfthĂŻf|fodachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:fodachĂŻfjĂŻf|fodachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:fodachĂŻfshĂŻf|fodachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:fodachĂŻfkĂŻf|fodachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fodachĂŻfthĂŻf|fodachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:fodachĂŻfjĂŻf|fodachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:fodachĂŻfshĂŻf|fodachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:fodachĂŻfkĂŻf|fodachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fodachĂŠthĂŠ|fodachĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:fodachĂŠjĂŠ|fodachĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:fodachĂŠshĂŠ|fodachĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:fodachĂŠkĂŠ|fodachĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fodachathatha|fodachathatha]] || [[word:fodachajaja|fodachajaja]] || [[word:fodachashasha|fodachashasha]] || [[word:fodachakaka|fodachakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fodachatha|fodachatha]] || [[word:fodachaja|fodachaja]] || [[word:fodachasha|fodachasha]] || [[word:fodachaka|fodachaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fodachafthaf|fodachafthaf]] || [[word:fodachafjaf|fodachafjaf]] || [[word:fodachafshaf|fodachafshaf]] || [[word:fodachafkaf|fodachafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:fodachasha|fodachasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:fodachshĂ«sha|fodachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fodachrosha|fodachrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fodachmusha|fodachmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:fodachyasha|fodachyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofodachnkshĂ«sha|gofodachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofodachnkrosha|gofodachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofodachnkmusha|gofodachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofodachnkyasha|gofodachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:fodadachasha|fodadachasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fodadachshĂ«sha|fodadachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fodadachrosha|fodadachrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fodadachmusha|fodadachmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fodadachyasha|fodadachyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofodadachnkshĂ«sha|gofodadachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofodadachnkrosha|gofodadachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofodadachnkmusha|gofodadachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofodadachnkyasha|gofodadachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:fedĂŠchasha|fedĂŠchasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fedĂŠchshĂ«sha|fedĂŠchshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fedĂŠchrosha|fedĂŠchrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fedĂŠchmusha|fedĂŠchmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fedĂŠchyasha|fedĂŠchyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofedĂŠchnkshĂ«sha|gofedĂŠchnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofedĂŠchnkrosha|gofedĂŠchnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofedĂŠchnkmusha|gofedĂŠchnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofedĂŠchnkyasha|gofedĂŠchnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:fodfachasha|fodfachasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fodfachshĂ«sha|fodfachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fodfachrosha|fodfachrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fodfachmusha|fodfachmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fodfachyasha|fodfachyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofodfachnkshĂ«sha|gofodfachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofodfachnkrosha|gofodfachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofodfachnkmusha|gofodfachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofodfachnkyasha|gofodfachnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
